mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_conversation_memory_entry WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM app_conversation_memory_entry WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY enabled DESC, priority DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_conversation_memory_entry ( conversation_id, entry_key, memory_type, title, content, keywords_json, secondary_keywords_json, priority, position, constant_injection, selective, enabled, confidence, source_message_from_id, source_message_to_id, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{conversationId}, #{entryKey}, #{memoryType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{keywordsJson}, #{secondaryKeywordsJson}, #{priority}, #{position}, #{constantInjection}, #{selective}, #{enabled}, #{confidence}, #{sourceMessageFromId}, #{sourceMessageToId}, NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE memory_type = VALUES(memory_type), title = VALUES(title), content = VALUES(content), keywords_json = VALUES(keywords_json), secondary_keywords_json = VALUES(secondary_keywords_json), priority = VALUES(priority), position = VALUES(position), constant_injection = VALUES(constant_injection), selective = VALUES(selective), enabled = VALUES(enabled), confidence = VALUES(confidence), source_message_from_id = VALUES(source_message_from_id), source_message_to_id = VALUES(source_message_to_id), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE app_conversation_memory_entry SET enabled = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE app_conversation_memory_entry SET enabled = 0, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_conversation_memory_entry WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_conversation_memory_entry WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
